We'd love to

hear from you.

Questions, hellos, and Sunday Zoom requests welcome

✉️ Email info@cathcartuf.org.uk
📍 Address 7 Struan Road
⏱️ Response time 2–3 working days
🙏 Prayer requests Use our Connect page
✉️

Send Us a Message

Interested in finding out more about us? We would love to hear from you — whether you have a question, want details of how to join us on Zoom, or just want to say hello.

Please include your email address so we can reply but a phone number is welcome too if you'd prefer we call.

Fields marked * are required.

We aim to respond within 2–3 working days.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
📬
